name: Min Byung-Gu

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Judgment of Light
basic.description: Byung-Gu attacks the enemy by swinging his mace powerfully. Deals Light elemental damage.

core.name: Holy Mace
core.description: Byung-Gu attacks the enemy by powerfully striking down with his mace. Deals Light elemental damage. Knocks Down the target. When Disguised, the user's damage is increased by 50%.

skill.name: Light's Glimmer
skill.description: Byung-Gu attacks the enemy and recovers allies' HP by unlocking the power of light. Deals Light elemental damage. Knocks Down the target. Applies [Light's Glimmer]: entire team recovers HP equal to 0.5% of Min Byung-Gu's Max HP every second (10 seconds). When Disguised, Recovery Rate increases by 100%.

skill.name: Conviction of Light
skill.description: The summoned divination circle of light moves forward slowly and attacks the enemy. Deals Light elemental damage. Applies [Punishment] effect: enemy's damage taken increases by 5% (20 seconds). When Disguised, the Punishment effect increases to 15%.

support.name: Judgment of Righteousness
support.description: Byung-Gu attacks the enemy by creating a divination circle with his mace, and grants additional effects to allies. Deals Light elemental damage. Knocks Down the target. Applies [Light's Glimmer] and [Punishment] effects. [Heavenly Voice]: entire team recovers HP equal to 1.2% of Min Byung-Gu's Max HP every second (10 seconds). [Song of the Battlefield]: increases damage taken by 18% (20 seconds).

qte.name: Divine Punishment
qte.description: Byung-Gu attacks the enemy with multiple flashes and divination circles. Deals Light elemental damage. Usage Conditions: Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate Skill, Stun, or Blind. Recharges Power Gauge by 50%.

ultimate.name: Heavenly Blessing
ultimate.description: Byung-Gu attacks the enemy by creating a large divination circle of light, and grants additional effects to allies. Deals Light elemental damage. Applies [Heavenly Blessing] to entire team: damage dealt and Critical Hit Rate increase by 12% (12 seconds). When Disguised, applies [Critical Hit Damage Increase]: team's Critical Hit damage increases equal to 40% of the amount exceeding Min Byung-Gu's basic Critical Hit damage (12 seconds).

passive.name: Disguise
passive.description: When tagging in or using Divine Punishment, applies the [Disguise] effect. [Disguise]: Decreases damage taken by 50%; Enhances specific skills' effects; When hit, removes [Disguise]. Duration: 10 seconds.

advancements: All team members' Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit damage increase by 12%.
When Light's Glimmer is used, the entire team instantly recovers HP equal to 2% of Min Byung-Gu's Max HP.
Byung-Gu's Power Gauge Acquisition Rate increases by 10%.
When the user uses Heavenly Blessing, increases the damage of the next Ultimate Skill of the team member with the highest Total Power by 50%.
